headline: VIP spots are limited. First access to invest in FarmThru.
subhead: A $5 refundable deposit gets you priority when the equity crowdfunding campaign opens on Birchal in mid-2026.
hero_copy:
FarmThru is opening to investors for the first time. Before the campaign goes live on Birchal, we are giving a limited number of people early access.

A $5 refundable deposit secures your VIP spot. You get first access to invest, priority updates on our progress, and an exclusive Q&A with the team. Your deposit is fully refundable at any time, no questions asked.

sections.heading: What VIP access gets you
sections.body:
First access to invest when the Birchal campaign opens. Priority updates on FarmThru's progress and plans. An exclusive Q&A session with the founding team. And your $5 deposit returned in full if you change your mind.

This is not a commitment to invest. It is a commitment to being informed before everyone else.

sections.heading: What you are getting early access to
sections.body:
FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store. Regenerative farms across NSW deliver to our Brookvale hub, and families collect on-demand. No middlemen. No lock-in.

100% grass-fed beef from Rachel's Farm. Wild-caught Alaskan salmon from Collins Wild Caught. Pork from Bundarra Farm. Biodynamic dairy from Paris Creek. Eggs from Farmer Brown. Every product from a named farm, raised without hormones, antibiotics, or feedlot finishing.

sections.heading: The terms
sections.body:
Equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal, launching mid-2026. Minimum investment: $50. Maximum: $10,000 per investor.

Investing in early-stage businesses carries real risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. All details, financials, and risks will be disclosed in the offer document on Birchal. We can't promise returns — early-stage investing carries real risk.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero: bold typography with a live counter showing remaining VIP spots. Below-fold: named farm partner grid, VIP perks checklist, Brookvale hub photo. Urgency through clarity, not desperation. Clean single-form design: name, email, $5 deposit button. Birchal badge visible in footer.
